error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: An HTTPS URL must be provided for webhook
title: Telegram Trigger requires HTTPS URL for webhook
symptom: When executing the Telegram Trigger node, n8n throws a 'Bad Request' error indicating that an HTTPS URL must be provided for the webhook.
applies_when: n8n is hosted behind a Cloudflare Tunnel
not_this_if: n8n is hosted with a direct public IP
Webhook URL is already set correctly
root_cause: Telegram requires that the webhook URL provided must be a valid HTTPS URL. If n8n is hosted behind a reverse proxy or tunnel, the correct public HTTPS URL must be configured in n8n for the webhook to function properly.
fix_steps: Set up your Cloudflare Tunnel and obtain the public HTTPS URL.
Set the WEBHOOK_URL in n8n to this HTTPS URL.
If using a reverse proxy, set N8N_PROXY_HOPS=1.
Restart your n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure the WEBHOOK_URL in n8n with the public HTTPS URL from your Cloudflare Tunnel.
